    topic: "Multi-day search and rescue in the Narrows"
    topicSlug: safety
    tier: lead
    action: awareness-only
    take: >
      A flash flood trapped a group in the Narrows for two days. If the
      forecast shows any rain in the drainage, this is not the day to hike it
      no matter how clear it looks at the trailhead.
    explorerImpact: >
      Search and rescue teams spent two days locating and extracting a group
      of five hikers caught by a flash flood in the Narrows. All survived.
      The park has not changed permit rules but is emphasizing forecast
      checks at the ranger station before permits are issued.

    take: >
      Four fee-free days landed on the calendar for fall. Pair one with a
      shoulder-season trip and the entrance fee disappears without the
      summer crowds.
    explorerImpact: >
      NPS announced four fee-free days for the fall season, matching the
      usual annual pattern. Entrance fees are waived system-wide; timed-entry
      and reservation systems at individual parks are unaffected and still
      required where they apply.
